name: 内格夫 | 巴洛克之沙
nameZh: 内格夫 | 巴洛克之沙
descriptionEn: The Negev is a beast that can keep the enemy at bay with its pin-point supressive fire, provided you have the luxury of time to gain control over it. An intricate, Italian inspired hydrographic pattern has been applied. Last Supper is served
descriptionZh: 子弹极多，射速极快的内格夫非常适合在多数回合中快速清场，作为交换，它的价格极其不菲，具有高扩散和令人发狂的后坐力。 这把武器使用了自定义涂装，喷涂了复杂的意式风格花纹。 最后的晚餐
